specification.topic-statement: The banner layer renders a fixed 6-row ASCII art decorative display with a version identifier and tagline at the top of the terminal.

scope.in-scope: Banner visibility determination, fixed height reporting, and row-by-row rendering with ANSI 256-color sequences and Unicode box-drawing characters.
scope.boundary: This topic provides three callbacks to the layer cake: visibility, height, and render. The layer cake controls when these are invoked and how viewport clipping is applied.
This topic reads a boolean flag owned by the agent. The flag is initialized to true and this topic never modifies it.
This topic appends bytes to an externally managed output buffer. Buffer growth and memory management are handled externally.

field.name: start_row
field.note: first visible row index for viewport clipping

field.name: row_count
field.note: number of rows to render from start_row

behavior.visibility-check: Returns the current value of the externally owned boolean flag. The flag is true by default for all newly created agents.
behavior.height-reporting: Always returns 6 regardless of terminal width or any other input. The banner occupies exactly 6 rows at all times.
behavior.rendering:
Each of the 6 rows is independently conditioned on whether its row index falls within the range [start_row, start_row + row_count). Rows outside this range produce no output. ANSI 256-color foreground escape sequences are generated at the start of each render call and reused across rows. Every row ends with an ANSI erase-to-end-of-line sequence and CRLF.
Foreground color 245 (dim gray). The double horizontal box-drawing character (═, 3 bytes UTF-8) is repeated for the full terminal width.
Foreground color 81 (cyan). One space followed by two pairs of rounded box tops: ╭─╮╭─╮ (rounded-corner + horizontal + rounded-corner, repeated twice).
This row uses multiple color segments with resets between them: - Left ear: coral/pink (color 211), character '(' with reset - Left eye left border: cyan (color 81) with reset - Left pupil: amber/gold (color 214), filled circle (●) with reset - Left eye right border: cyan (color 81), vertical bar with reset - Right eye left border: cyan (color 81), vertical bar with reset - Right pupil: amber/gold (color 214), filled circle (●) with reset - Right eye right border: cyan (color 81), vertical bar with reset - Right ear: coral/pink (color 211), character ')' with reset - Four spaces - Version label: soft blue (color 153), the literal text "Ikigai v" followed by the build version string
Eye lids in cyan (color 81): one space followed by two pairs of rounded box bottoms: ╰─╯╰─╯. Five spaces. Tagline in light gray (color 250): the literal text "Agentic Orchestration" (21 characters).
Coral/pink (color 211): two spaces followed by ╰──╯ (rounded-corner + two horizontals + rounded-corner).
Identical to row 0: dim gray (color 245), double horizontal character (═) repeated for the full terminal width.
